isi.albums: Yes, No, Maybe (ToGetHer X Christine Bülow)
isi.lyrics:

Romanization

Makes me ohh

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YOON JAY - BULDAK

Romanization

Every time you kiss me on my lips, I
Kinda need some time to cool myself down a bit
You’re so spicy, but I want you more
And you make me sweat by the time I'm done

Oh, you give me
a fever all the time, whenever you’re around
Let me whisper
sweet little nothings in your ears

Every night
You are my fire
You take me higher
All night long

You cross my mind like Buldak Ramen
Especially the one with the cheese on
Every night I always be
I wanna have a Buldak with cheese

ne nuneul bomyeon eoneusae tto
nae nuneun banjjakgeoryeo at dawn
Stuck on you like cheese on Buldak, Buldak

Baby when I look into your eyes, I
Kinda get these butterflies in my stomach
Then it goes away when you are gone
Which I really don't like it when it's done

Oh, you give me
a fever all the time, whenever you’re around
Let me whisper
sweet little nothings in your ears

Every night
You are my fire
You take me higher
All night long

You cross my mind like Buldak Ramen
Especially the one with the cheese on
Every night I always be
I wanna have a Buldak with cheese

ne nuneul bomyeon eoneusae tto
nae nuneun banjjakgeoryeo at dawn
Stuck on you like cheese on Buldak, Buldak

Hangeul

Every time you kiss me on my lips, I
Kinda need some time to cool myself down a bit
You’re so spicy, but I want you more
And you make me sweat by the time I'm done

Oh, you give me

Which I really don't like it when it's done

Oh, you give me
a fever all the time, whenever you’re around
Let me whisper

You cross my mind like Buldak Ramen

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Kim Hyun Min - Stay With Me

Romanization

You got me stay with it
nado moreuge seumyeo
moreun cheokhaedo tiga najana
Just wait

You know You keep that but still you dont say nothin
tto nunchiman boda mot bon cheogeul hae
aesseo utgo urin geudaero

No lying I feel it
I know hold back I just like the way
you are no more no lying I feel
it oh honey geudaero
ne yeope itgo sipeo

Stay with me tonight
aljana mal an haedo
Feel the vibe just like that
neowa na sijagin geol

You pull me slow with it
siseoni tto gajana
moreuge unne amu tteut eopge
geunyang

You know You look back but still you dont say nothin
da deullijana tto mot bon cheogeul hae

you are no more no lying I feel

isi.lyrics:
Lyric 12BH - My Blue

Romanization

I don’t wanna die in the blue no more
When I wake up in the morning
Maybe I’ll disappear
But I still want to live cupcakes await
I don't even realize I’m a liar
Nobody can help me

If I could turn back time, I’d tell you to leave it now
'Cause beautiful things never last

If somebody knows me
And somebody helps me
Can you love me?
Love me, my blue

I don’t wanna die in the blue no more
When I wake up in the morning
Maybe I’ll disappear
But I still want to live cupcakes await
I don't even realize I’m a liar
Nobody can help me

If I could turn back time, I’d tell you to leave it now
'Cause beautiful things never last

If somebody knows me
And somebody helps me
Can you love me?
Love me, my blue
